ocean:Rockaway Beach (90th St peaks):202.spot_notes: The ITH-JFK play: daily Delta nonstop, ~3hr door to sand, faster than driving. Regional jet means NO longboard in the hold; carry rubber, rent or stash a board (Boarders / Locals, 90th St). Punchy jetty peaks, best on S swell with N wind, fall hurricane season aligns with warm water. Fair day here can beat a good day 6 hrs away.
